node.text: John started surfing five years ago and loves the connection to nature it provides.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "sports like") AND not(atom(content =~ "basketball")) on Observation 6 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: John is planning a team trip with his friends to explore a new city next month.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "sports like") AND not(atom(content =~ "basketball")) on Observation 2 (Score: 0.83)

node.text: John is considering Edinburgh, Scotland for the team trip based on Tim's suggestion.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "sports like") AND not(atom(content =~ "basketball")) on Observation 3 (Score: 0.74)

node.text: John is teaming up with a local organization to help disadvantaged kids with sports and school as part of his charity work.
John finds that struggles in sports, like overcoming deficits, lead to a greater sense of satisfaction when victorious.
John recently took a trip to Chicago and found the locals to be friendly.
John is open to receiving support and advice from others, like Tim.
John loves the energy in a stadium during a sports game, with everyone cheering and getting excited.
John plans to use his platform post-basketball to make a positive difference, potentially by starting a foundation and doing charity work to leave a meaningful legacy.
